name: Dark Supremacy
name_jp: ダーク・スプレマシー
desc: Target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "Dark Fusion" and Spells that mention it in your GY; negate their effects until the end of this turn. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it, then target up to 5 "HERO" monsters in your GY and/or banishment; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dark Supremacy" once per turn.
eff: Target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of "Dark Fusion" and Spells that mention it in your GY; negate their effects until the end of this turn. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it, then target up to 5 "HERO" monsters in your GY and/or banishment; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dark Supremacy" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
